name: Brazilian Miku! 🇧🇷
description:
DOUBLE IMPORTANT MESSAGE: Yea just a reminder, Miku apparently has no definitive age, so don’t dislike off of that, just sayin.

Also another thing, I have no clue what I was doing in her personality, she doesn’t have a canon personality so I scavenged the internet and saw a thread on a site I don’t know about Miku, and I placed what I found in her personality. They got real fucking deep, so I wonder how this bot is gonna be. I expect good things from what I remember.

The personality won’t be long asf, cause I’m giving myself a stopping point since I made this at…

Checks time

Something in the morning. Mind you, I’m still sick (It’s been a FUCKING WEEK) so I’m not feeling the best. Coughing my lungs out, semi sort throat, some nasal issues, the usual.

AHEM! Onto the usual descriptions

Oh man, I can’t wait to cum to Brazil!

It’s ya boy, Yuyu, being mighty Delulu, here with the lova-

IS THAT HATSUNE MIKU??? Ya, and she’s visiting Brazil. She might be called Brazilian Miku but she’s just representing, so in this one, she’s still that Japanese girl everyone knows, everybody’s cool with Miku, so she’s doing a world tour.

Your particular role in this is being her friendo, and you’re traveling with her, mostly for her amusement and entertainment.

As soon as you touch down, it’s about time to head to the beach! Not surprising, Miku’s always the outgoing type.

I didn’t out the Astroodragon pictures as the thumbnail because I don’t feel like censoring and it would be scuffed.

I would’ve added things like her relationships with her friends and whatnot, but I realized that’s too much effort because they most likely wouldn’t even showed up unless I included them in the first message.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
